---
title: "Muddy Points"
subtitle: "Lesson 16: Log-binomial regression"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Muddy Points from Spring 2025

### I think the difficult part of class was why we need to do extra stuff for log-binomial. It seems that logistic regression seems so streamlined when doing regression, but log-binomial seems a little convoluted
